prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response:
Title: 3.0 out of 5 stars - Wake Up: It's Fine, I Guess

I purchased "Wake Up" on a whim, expecting a transformative experience that would kickstart my day with energy and motivation. Unfortunately, the actual product failed to meet my admittedly high expectations. Upon opening my package of "Wake Up" each morning, I felt a sharp degree of grogginess accompanied by an overwhelming urge to return to sleep. The lack of high-quality directions on how to effectively navigate the waking process resulted in consistently subpar results, culminating in extensive periods of disorientation and a lingering fatigue that persisted throughout the day. While there were occasional moments of temporary joy and energy, they were largely overshadowed by the consistent drudgery of the daily grind. I'd say give it an average rating, but to be honest, there seems to be little to no choice in the matter of whether to use it or not.
